zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Gascoigne於1480年出生在英國越可爾加福索普時，她的父親Sir William Gascoigne V31歲，母親Margaret Percy33歲。她於1497年與Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1521年4月15日之後在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Gascoigne于1480年出生在英国越可爾加福索普时，她的父亲Sir William Gascoigne V31岁，母亲Margaret Percy33岁。她于1497年与Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1521年4月15日之后在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gascoigne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Gascon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jaime, Mario, Miguel, Rafael, Ruben, Amado, Ana, Ana Maria, Angel, Caridad.  French Andre, Chantal, Jean-Guy, Jean-Philippe, Monique, Serge, Simonne.
French; Spanish (Gascón): habitational name for someone from the province of Gascony, Old French Gascogne (see Gascoigne ). This surname is also found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Anne

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Gascoigne was born in 1480, in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William Gascoigne V, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Percy, was 33. She married Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. in 1497, in Walton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died after 15 April 1521, in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Gascoigne est née en 1480, à Gawthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Gascoigne V, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Percy, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. en 1497, à Walton, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée après 15 avril 1521, à Everwyck, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1497 in Walton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb nach 15. April 1521 in Yorkshire, England.

Lei sposato Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. nel 1497, nel Walton, West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì dopo il 15 aprile 1521, nel Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Gascoigneが1480年にイギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペで生まれた時，父Sir William Gascoigne Vは31歳，母Margaret Percyは33歳であった。1497年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアワルトンでSir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1521年4月15日以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Gascoigne(이)가 1480년 영국 요르크실르 가w소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Gascoigne V(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Percy(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 월턴에서 Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1521년 4월 15일 이후 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Gascoigne родилась в 1480 г. в местности гавтаурп, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Gascoigne V было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Percy, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. в 1497 г. в местности валтон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла после 15 апрель 1521 г. в местности еркшир, Англия.
